hero.subtitle: Your seaside sanctuary — fresh air, crystal water and an unforgettable holiday!

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Discover the beauty of the
about.p1: Complex 'Gradina, Chernomorets' is a family gem located in the heart of the resort village, just a step away from the sandy beach. Our mission is to provide you with a peaceful and cozy environment for your seaside vacation.
about.p2: The complex features an outdoor pool with sunbeds, a cozy indoor pool bar, and modernly furnished rooms and apartments. Here you will find everything you need – from air-conditioned rooms to a special touch for every guest.

items.title: Outdoor Pool
items.desc: Clean water and sun all day for our guests

items.title: Indoor Pool Bar
items.desc: Cooling drinks and a cozy atmosphere

items.title: Parking
items.desc: Private parking (for apartments) and free parking for rooms

items.title: Sunbeds
items.desc: Free use of sunbeds around the pool

items.title: Fully Equipped
items.desc: AC, Refrigerator, TV, and WiFi in every unit

footer.about_text: A charming hotel on the Bulgarian Black Sea coast. Experience peaceful moments, fresh sea air, and warm hospitality.

gallery.title: Photos
gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.subheading: Explore our hotel, rooms, and the beautiful sea nature around us.

contact.heading: Get in
contact.subheading: Have questions? We are here to help you plan the perfect holiday.

quote.text: “The sea is always the same and never the same. That is its magic. Such is human life — not a single day is repeated, not a single moment.”
quote.author: — Stefan Tsanev
